conclusion: Leakage-aware ordinal benchmark design is explicit and source-data-driven.
RiceGeneFormer combines gene tokens with a controlled top-SNP shortcut.
RiceGeneFormer approaches LightGBM but remains below balanced SNP-MLP.
Hard imbalanced traits explain much of the remaining performance gap.
Cross-region benchmarks do not support a robustness advantage.
Ablations define boundaries rather than stable biological gains.
Gene attention is diagnostic only under bounded gene selection.
